conversation_history.content: I need to review security for our payment system

{"response_type": "threat_modeling", "analysis": "Okay, let's start by understanding the scope of your payment system.  Reviewing security for a payment system requires a detailed understanding of its architecture and operations. To begin, I need some information to guide our analysis.", "completeness_score": 0.1, "missing_info": ["System type (e.g., e-commerce website, mobile app, API)", "Payment gateway(s) used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal, Adyen)", "Supported payment methods (e.g., credit cards, debit cards, digital wallets)", "Data flow diagram of the payment process", "Authentication and authorization mechanisms", "Compliance requirements (e.g., PCI DSS)"], "follow_up_questions": ["Could you describe the overall architecture of the payment system?
